zh.lifeSummary: 當Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton於1588年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利時，她的父親Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley42歲，母親Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley38歲。她和William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland至少有2個兒子。她去世於1662年12月22日在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾享年74歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾萊特肯尼曼諾丘寧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton于1588年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利时，她的父亲Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley42岁，母亲Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley38岁。她和William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland至少有2个儿子。她去世于1662年12月22日在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾享年74岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 多聶加爾萊特肯尼曼諾丘寧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hamilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

nameMeanings.name: Isobel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: "Grizel"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Griselda , used particularly in Scotland, and in the north of England at least as late as the 18th century. The name has now died out, no doubt in part because of its similarity to the vocabulary word grizzle meaning ‘to grumble or whine’.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

Great Catholic-Gaelic rebellion for return of lands, later joined by Old English Catholics in Ireland. Under leadership of Irish chieftain, Rory O'More, conspiracy was formed to seize Dublin and expel the English. English settlers were driven out of Ulster. Catholics hold 59% of land in Ireland.

The Protestant Lord Protector of England, Oliver Cromwell, landed at Dublin. His troops killed 2,000 men. A great part of lands in Munster, Leinster and Ulster (Drogheda and Wexford) was confiscated and divided among the English soldiers.

en.lifeSummary: When Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton was born in 1588, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley, was 42 and her mother, Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley, was 38. She had at least 2 sons with William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland. She died on 22 December 1662, in County Donegal, Ireland, at the age of 74, and was buried in Manorcunningham, Letterkenny, County Donegal, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton est née en 1588, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland. Elle est décédée le 22 décembre 1662, à County Donegal, Irlande, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Manorcunningham, Letterkenny, County Donegal, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton 1588 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley 42 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley 38. Sie hatte mit William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 22. Dezember 1662 im Alter von 74 Jahren in County Donegal, Irland und wurde in Manorcunningham, Letterkenny, County Donegal, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton è nata il nel 1588 nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland. Morì il 22 dicembre 1662, nel County Donegal, Irlanda, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Manorcunningham, Letterkenny, County Donegal, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Isobel "Grizel" Hamiltonが1588年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで生まれた時，父Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisleyは42歳，母Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisleyは38歳であった。彼女はWilliam Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1662年12月22日にアイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルで74歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルレッテルケニーマノークウニンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton(이)가 1588년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1662년 12월 22일 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸 레터켄이 먼르쿤잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton nasceu em 1588, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland. Ela faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1662, em County Donegal, Irlanda, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Manorcunningham, Letterkenny, County Donegal, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton родилась в 1588 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland. Она умерла 22 декабря 1662 г. в местности коунти доунегаль, Ирландия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности маноркуннингхам, леттиркенни, коунти доунегаль, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isobel "Grizel" Hamilton nació en 1588, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con William Cunningham, Lord High Chancellor of Scotland. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1662, en County Donegal, Irlanda, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Manorcunningham, Letterkenny, County Donegal, Irlanda.
